3. Navigate to Stores section

Title: Widget opens scoped Broken Page grid
Preconditions:
1. C406875 test case passed
2. 'Active broken links' widget is visible
3. Admin user has appropriate permissions
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Click on 'Active broken links' widget
2. Wait for grid to load
3. Verify grid opens with broken links data
4. Verify grid shows appropriate columns (Permalink, Status, Hit count)
5. Check that grid is scoped to current store

2. Grid should display broken links data
3. Columns should include: Permalink, Status, Hit count
4. Data should be scoped to B2B-store only
5. Grid should show total count of items

4. Data should be scoped to B2B-store only
5. Grid should show total count of items

2. Wait for grid to load
3. Verify grid opens with broken links data
4. Verify grid shows appropriate columns (Permalink, Status, Hit count)

4. Navigation options should be provided

2. Access broken link: https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/not-found
3. Verify 404 page is displayed

5. Verify proper 404 page structure

Title: Hit count tracking validation
Preconditions:
1. Previous frontend tests completed
2. Admin dashboard accessible
3. Broken links grid contains hit count data
Steps:
Step Description:
1. Access admin dashboard and navigate to broken links grid
2. Note current hit count for 'not-found' broken link
3. Navigate to frontend and access /not-found URL
4. Return to admin dashboard
5. Verify hit count has been updated
Expected Result:
1. Initial hit count should be recorded
2. Frontend visit should be tracked
3. Hit count should increment after visit
4. Admin dashboard should reflect updated count
5. Tracking should be real-time and accurate
Steps (Expected Result):
1. 1. Initial hit count should be recorded
2. Frontend visit should be tracked
3. Hit count should increment after visit
4. Admin dashboard should reflect updated count
5. Tracking should be real-time and accurate
Steps (Step):
1. 1. Access admin dashboard and navigate to broken links grid
2. Note current hit count for 'not-found' broken link
3. Navigate to frontend and access /not-found URL
4. Return to admin dashboard
5. Verify hit count has been updated
